# 524Tracker — Credit Card Application Rule Tracker

## About
524Tracker helps credit card enthusiasts track the Chase 5/24 rule
and other bank application restrictions to maximize credit card
welcome bonuses.

## Key Pages
- /: Main 5/24 tracker tool
- /rules-guide: Complete guide to bank application rules
- /top-cards: Top credit cards to get under 5/24
- /best-cards-by-category: Best cards by spending category
- /card-value-calculator: Calculate credit card point values
- /faq: Frequently asked questions about 5/24

## Blog Posts
- /blog/chase-5-24-rule: The Chase 5/24 rule explained
- /blog/amex-once-per-lifetime-rule: Amex once per lifetime rule
- /blog/citi-8-65-rule: Citi 8/65 rule explained
- /blog/bank-of-america-2-3-4-rule: BofA 2/3/4 rule explained

## Content Summary
524Tracker provides free tools and guides for credit card
application strategy. Content covers Chase 5/24, Amex lifetime
bonus rules, Citi velocity rules, and Bank of America restrictions.
All content is for informational purposes only.
